01004.name: Agnes Baker
01004.text:
[reaction] After 1 or more horror is placed on Agnes Baker: Deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location. (Limit once per phase.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1 for each horror on Agnes Baker.

01012.name: Heirloom of Hyperborea
01012.text:
Agnes Baker deck only.
[reaction] After you play a [[Spell]] card: Draw 1 card.

01060.name: Shrivelling
01060.text: Uses (4 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Fight. This attack uses [willpower] instead of [combat] and deals +1 damage. If a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol is revealed during this attack, take 1 horror.

01062.name: Arcane Studies
01062.text:
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [willpower] for this skill test.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [intellect] for this skill test.

01064.name: Drawn to the Flame
01064.text: Draw the top card of the encounter deck. Then, discover 2 clues at your location.

01074.name: Baseball Bat
01074.text: [action]: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage. If a [skull] or [auto_fail] symbol is revealed during this attack, discard Baseball Bat after the attack resolves.

01076.name: Stray Cat
01076.text: [fast] Discard Stray Cat: Automatically evade a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location.

01086.name: Knife
01086.text: [action]: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack. [action] Discard Knife: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage.

01091.name: Overpower
01091.text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
If this test is successful, draw 1 card.

01098.name: Haunted
01098.text: Revelation - Add Haunted to your threat area. You get -1 to each of your skills. [action] [action]: Discard Haunted.

01100.name: Hypochondria
01100.text: Revelation - Add Hypochondria to your threat area. Forced - After you take 1 or more damage: Take 1 direct horror. [action] [action]: Discard Hypochondria.

01117.name: Lita Chantler
01117.text:
While you control Lita Chantler, she gains:
"Each investigator at your location gets +1 [combat].
[reaction] When an investigator at your location successfully attacks a [[Monster]] enemy: That investigator deals +1 damage."

01137.name: "Wolf-Man" Drew
01137.text: Spawn - Downtown. Forced - When "Wolf-Man" Drew attacks: Heal 1 damage from him.

01138.name: Herman Collins
01138.text: Spawn - Graveyard. [action] Choose and discard 4 cards from your hand: Parley. Add Herman Collins to the victory display.

01144.name: The Ritual Begins
01144.text: Each enemy gets +1 fight and +1 evade.

01145.name: Vengeance Awaits
01145.text: Forced - When this agenda advances: - If the investigators are at Act 1, put the set-aside Ritual Site into play and spawn the set-aside Umôrdhoth there. - If the investigators are at Act 2 or 3, discard all enemies at the Ritual Site and spawn the set-aside Umôrdhoth there.

01147.name: Into the Darkness
01147.text: Objective - If an investigator enters the Ritual Site, advance.

01149.name: Main Path
01149.text: The Main Path is connected to each other [[Woods]] location. [action]: Resign. "There's nothing we can do to stop them!" You flee from the woods, leaving Arkham to its grisly fate.

01150.name: Arkham Woods
01150.text: Forced - After you enter this location: Test [willpower] (4). If you fail, take 1 horror and 1 damage.

01152.name: Arkham Woods
01152.text: This location is investigated using [willpower] instead of the skill indicated by the investigation attempt.

01154.name: Arkham Woods
01154.text: This location is investigated using [combat] instead of the skill indicated by the investigation attempt.

01156.name: Ritual Site
01156.text: Forced - At the end of the round, if there are fewer than 2 clues per investigator on Ritual Site: Add clues to it until it has 2 clues per investigator on it.

01158.name: Umôrdhoth's Wrath
01158.text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (5). For each point you fail by, you must either (choose one): Choose and discard a card from your hand, or take 1 damage and 1 horror.

01163.name: Rotting Remains
01163.text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). For each point you fail by, take 1 horror.

01164.name: Frozen in Fear
01164.text: Revelation - Put Frozen in Fear into play in your threat area. The first time you perform one of the following actions (move, fight, or evade) each round, it costs 1 additional action. Forced - At the end of your turn: Test [willpower] (3). If you succeed, discard Frozen in Fear.

01165.name: Dissonant Voices
01165.text: Revelation - Put Dissonant Voices into play in your threat area. You cannot play assets or events. Forced - At the end of the round: Discard Dissonant Voices.

01166.name: Ancient Evils
01166.text: Revelation - Place 1 doom on the current agenda. This effect can cause the current agenda to advance.

01175.name: Screeching Byakhee
01175.text: Prey - Lowest remaining sanity. Hunter. While engaged with an investigator with remaining sanity 4 or fewer, Screeching Byakhee gets +1 fight and +1 evade.

50026b.name: Narôgath
50026b.text:
Spawn - Engaged with Prey.
Prey - Nearest to another [[Cultist]] enemy.
Hunter.
Narôgath gets +3 health per investigator.
While Narôgath is ready, each investigator at its location or a connecting location cannot Parley with [[Cultist]] enemies.

50034.name: Arkham Woods
50034.text: Forced - After you reveal a chaos token from the chaos bag while investigating this location: Reveal and resolve an additional chaos token. (Limit once per test.)

50037.name: Umôrdhoth's Hunger
50037.text: Revelation - Each investigator must discard 1 card at random from his or her hand. Each investigator who has no cards in his or her hand is killed. Heal 1 damage from each enemy in play.

50041.name: Disciple of the Devourer
50041.text:
Spawn - Farthest empty location.
Forced - After you spawn Disciple of the Devourer: You must either place 1 doom on it or place 1 of your clues on its location. If the current agenda is not agenda 1, do both instead.

50042.name: Corpse-Taker
50042.text:
Spawn - Farthest empty location.
Forced - At the end of the mythos phase: Place 1 doom on Corpse-Taker.
Forced - At the end of the enemy phase: Corpse-Taker moves once toward Rivertown or Main Path. If Corpse-Taker is already at Rivertown or Main Path, move all doom from Corpse-Taker to the current agenda, instead.

50043.name: Mask of Umôrdhoth
50043.text:
Revelation - Attach to the farthest [[Cultist]] enemy and place 1 doom on that enemy. If there are no [[Cultist]] enemies in play, search the encounter deck and discard pile for a [[Cultist]] enemy, draw it, and attach Mask of Umôrdhoth to it. Shuffle the encounter deck.
Attached enemy gets +2 health. If attached enemy is unique, it gains retaliate. If it is non-unique, it gains aloof instead.

50045.name: Billy Cooper
50045.text:
Spawn - Easttown.
Forced - After a [[Monster]] enemy is defeated at Billy Cooper's location: Add Billy Cooper to the victory display.

50046.name: Alma Hill
50046.text:
Spawn - Southside.
[action]: Parley. Draw the top 3 cards of the encounter deck. Then, add Alma Hill to the victory display.
